title: Content moderation threshold under classification error
prompt: A platform chooses a removal threshold for user posts based on a noisy classifier score. Removed benign posts and retained harmful posts carry different modeled losses. Write a decision-focused narrative that acknowledges classification error and does not claim causal effects on long-run community health.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: minimize expected false-removal and harmful-retention loss
model_specification.mechanism: Moving the threshold trades false removals against harmful content retained.

prohibited_inferences: The threshold causally improves long-run community trust
